Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import asyncio
async def main\(\):
    from nli_cmbs.db.session import async_session_factory
    from sqlalchemy import delete
    from nli_cmbs.db.models import CikMapping
    async with async_session_factory\(\) as session:
        result = await session.execute\(
            delete\(CikMapping\).where\(CikMapping.deal_ticker == 'BMARK 2024-V6'\)
        \)
        await session.commit\(\)
        print\(f'Deleted {result.rowcount} cached entry'\)
asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine, async_sessionmaker
from sqlalchemy import text

async def check\(\):
    engine = create_async_engine\('postgresql+asyncpg://nli:nli@localhost:5432/nli_cmbs'\)
    async with async_sessionmaker\(engine\)\(\) as session:
        r = await session.execute\(text\(\\"\\"\\"
            SELECT f.id, f.accession_number, f.filing_date, f.parsed
            FROM filings f JOIN deals d ON f.deal_id = d.id
            WHERE d.ticker = 'BMARK 2024-V6'
            ORDER BY f.filing_date DESC
        \\"\\"\\"\)\)
        for row in r.all\(\):
            print\(row\)
        r2 = await session.execute\(text\('SELECT count\(*\) FROM loan_snapshots'\)\)
        print\('Total snapshots:', r2.scalar\(\)\)
    await engine.dispose\(\)
asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine, async_sessionmaker
from sqlalchemy import select
from nli_cmbs.db.models import Deal
from nli_cmbs.services.metrics import compute_deal_metrics

async def check\(\):
    engine = create_async_engine\('postgresql+asyncpg://nli:nli@localhost:5432/nli_cmbs'\)
    async with async_sessionmaker\(engine\)\(\) as session:
        r = await session.execute\(select\(Deal\).where\(Deal.ticker == 'BMARK 2024-V6'\)\)
        deal = r.scalar_one\(\)
        metrics = await compute_deal_metrics\(session, deal.id\)
        print\('wa_dscr:', metrics.wa_dscr\)
        print\('wa_occupancy:', metrics.wa_occupancy\)
        print\('wa_ltv:', metrics.wa_ltv\)
        print\('pct_io:', metrics.pct_interest_only\)
        print\('pct_balloon:', metrics.pct_balloon\)
        print\('has_financials:', metrics.has_current_financials\)
    await engine.dispose\(\)
asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine, async_sessionmaker
from sqlalchemy import text
async def check\(\):
    engine = create_async_engine\('postgresql+asyncpg://nli:nli@localhost:5432/nli_cmbs'\)
    async with async_sessionmaker\(engine\)\(\) as session:
        r = await session.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT property_type, count\(*\) FROM loans GROUP BY property_type ORDER BY count\(*\) DESC LIMIT 10\\"\)\)
        for row in r.all\(\):
            print\(f'{row[0]}: {row[1]}'\)
    await engine.dispose\(\)
asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
